title: Added atomic-registries and iptables to install.md
body:
Added atomic-registries and iptables packages to fix on RHEL 7.4
Signed-off-by: Scott McCarty<scott.mccarty@gmail.com>

comments.body: Git validation is yelling about signoff, but I do see one in the commit
the signoff looks like it was mangled.  @fatherlinux did it get generated by git commit --ammend -s ?

No, I made the comment in the GitHub web interface thinking it would be 
a quick change. It "looked" normal when I did it. Sorry for the chaos. I 
can redo it from the CMDLINE if that helps....


On 02/15/2018 11:58 AM, Brent Baude wrote:
>
> the signoff looks like it was mangled. @fatherlinux 
> <https://github.com/fatherlinux> did it get generated by git commit 
> --ammend -s ?
>
> —
> You are receiving this because you were mentioned.
> Reply to this email directly, view it on GitHub

Scott McCarty

scott.mccarty@gmail.com

http://crunchtools.com

@fatherlinux

@fatherlinux On command line

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

Should fix it.

Actually my #337 took care of this already.  I made the changes in my version to avoid merge conflcts thinking this one would get in first.  I think we can just close this PR and hope @fatherlinux gets another PR into Buildah at some point!

For sure :-)
